description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof and a modest front yard, surrounded by several trees and shrubs. The house features a driveway leading to a covered carport on one side, with a visible parked car. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely painted stucco or siding, and the roof is dark gray. Windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with a few on each visible side, and the main entryway is sheltered by a small overhang. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a street, with landscaping elements such as bushes and small trees enhancing curb appeal. The overall design is practical and typical of mid- to late-20th-century American residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story suburban house with a gable roof, light exterior walls, a carport, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs. The house sits adjacent to a street and sidewalk, featuring a simple, functional window and entryway arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entryway, and landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, carport, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, rear windows, and additional landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, side windows, and more of the surrounding trees and sidewalk.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
